findings.problem: After the lens sequence peaks, the last third keeps translating the same conclusion into fresh thematic phrasing: Owen was right, battle is coming, the timetable has changed, the work comes first. The repeated restatement weakens the chapter's aftershock and costs shortlist-level compression.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress and differentiate the aftermath beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:125, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:137, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:139, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:147. Keep one realization beat, one concrete planning beat, and one exit beat, but cut or repurpose the extra thesis restatements so each surviving paragraph adds new information, cost, or obstacle rather than another version of the same realization.
findings.acceptance_test: Read the revised passage from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:113 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:149. Pass only if each paragraph after the lens reset introduces a distinct consequence (interpretive shock, material plan, secrecy cost, or physical exit consequence) and no two adjacent paragraphs can both be paraphrased as 'battle is coming and Owen must work faster.'

findings.problem: The chamber opening is well earned, but the star-lens becomes plot-legible too quickly once Owen reaches the desk. In a few beats he goes from worn notation and a cracked instrument to specific causal reads about the Carrows, the corridor disaster, and siege-state battle load, with too little calibration to make the decipherment feel fully hard-won.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the reading sequence at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:79, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:83, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:89, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:101 so Owen has to visibly calibrate the instrument. Options: make him cross-check a symbol against the plinth tables, misread once and correct it, or frame one or two conclusions as provisional inference before he names local events and battle-scale meaning.
findings.acceptance_test: Read the revised sequence from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:79 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:107. Pass only if Owen performs at least one concrete interpretive check before naming local causes or siege implications, and at least one major conclusion is presented as supported inference rather than instant certainty. If activation still jumps straight to event-specific diagnosis with no calibration beat, fail.

findings.problem: The prose leans repeatedly on the same negation-and-redefinition template: phenomena arrive as 'less like X than Y,' 'not X but Y,' or 'no longer X. It was Y.' Owen's analytic voice can support this once or twice, but at this frequency the discovery scene starts sounding mechanically composed rather than freshly perceived.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the sentence architecture at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:69, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:107, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:139. Keep the strongest one or two reversal sentences, but let the remaining beats land through direct sensory statement, action, or plainer declarative prose instead of another correction formula.
findings.acceptance_test: Read the revised beats anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:69, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:85, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:95, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:107, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_13.md:139. Pass only if no more than two of those beats still rely on a negation/correction construction to make their point; if three or more still hinge on 'not/less/no longer ... but' reversal syntax, fail.

summary: FAIL on award, craft, and prose; PASS on dialogue. Owen's private register and the chapter's sparse spoken lines stay consistent with the style bible, and I found no continuity contradiction or narrative-tense drift. The unresolved problems are structural overstatement after the reveal, a slightly too convenient jump from damaged instrument to specific diagnosis, and repeated negation/correction sentence patterns that flatten the discovery prose.
